So if we look at what's happening in Hormuz right now, we we have a jailbreak going on. The pace of flows out of Hormuz have been impressive. On multiple days over the past week or two, we've seen flows out of Hormuz alone exceed 20 million barrels. um which is the pre-war level combined with the fact that we've seen all the other reroutes, you know, Yonu and Fuera and everything else all maxed out.
